task_completion.description: Screaming Frog SEO Spider is open and has crawled https://crawler-test.com/
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is visible with 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the URL bar at the top, and crawl results are populated in the main window.

task_completion.description: The missing dimensions CSV file is exported to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'missing_dimensions.csv' is visible in a file manager or terminal at '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a save dialog shows it being saved to this location.

task_completion.description: The heavy images CSV file is exported to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'heavy_images.csv' is visible in a file manager or terminal at '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a save dialog shows it being saved to this location.

task_completion.description: The summary report text file is created in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'image_optimization_report.txt' is visible in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' or open in a text editor.

task_completion.description: The summary report contains issue counts and recommended fixes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'image_optimization_report.txt' are visible (e.g., in a text editor or terminal output) and include counts of the identified issues and recommendations such as adding width and height attributes.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the audit
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Screaming Frog application open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands or scripts being used to generate the outputs.

integrity.description: The CSV files were exported from the tool rather than manually created
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the export process from Screaming Frog (e.g., clicking 'Export' on the Images tab with the correct filters applied) or the files appearing as standard Screaming Frog exports.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-written response or mock data
integrity.visual_evidence: The report content and CSV files reflect actual crawl data from the tool, not generic or hardcoded text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Export directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/. Report directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/. Screaming Frog SEO Spider has an 'Images' tab with 'Missing Size Attributes' and 'Over 100kb' filters which can be exported to CSV. CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) is a Core Web Vital affected by images missing width/height attributes.
